omitted_declarations.policy_reference:
• Analytics Providers: With analytics companies to help us understand how the Application is used, monitor performance, and improve our services. Examples include:
■ Google Firebase (including Analytics & Crashlytics): https://policies.google.com/privacy/partners
■ Meta (Facebook) Analytics: https://www.facebook.com/about/privacy/
■ Amplitude: https://amplitude.com/privacy
■ Mixpanel: https://mixpanel.com/legal/privacy-policy/
■ GrowthBook: https://www.growthbook.io/privacy
■ UXCam: https://uxcam.com/privacy-policy/

• Crash Logs and Diagnostics: Information related to crashes and performance issues, including device state information, unique device identifiers, and location information, to help diagnose and fix problems. This data is often processed via third-party services like Firebase Crashlytics.

• Crash Logs and Diagnostics: Information related to crashes and performance issues, including device state information, unique device identifiers, and location information, to help diagnose and fix problems. This data is often processed via third-party services like Firebase Crashlytics.

• Analytics Providers: With analytics companies to help us understand how the Application is used, monitor performance, and improve our services. Examples include:
■ Google Firebase (including Analytics & Crashlytics): https://policies.google.com/privacy/partners
■ Meta (Facebook) Analytics: https://www.facebook.com/about/privacy/
■ Amplitude: https://amplitude.com/privacy
■ Mixpanel: https://mixpanel.com/legal/privacy-policy/
■ GrowthBook: https://www.growthbook.io/privacy
■ UXCam: https://uxcam.com/privacy-policy/

• Advertising Partners: With ad networks and advertising partners to serve advertisements within the Application. This may involve sharing your Advertising ID, IP address, location data (if enabled), and usage information to enable them to select and serve relevant ads, including personalized ads (if you have consented or not opted-out where applicable). Examples include (but are not limited to):
■ Google AdMob/AdSense: https://policies.google.com/privacy/partners
■ Meta (Facebook) Audience Network: https://www.facebook.com/about/privacy/
■ AppLovin: https://www.applovin.com/privacy/
■ Unity Ads: https://unity3d.com/legal/privacy-policy
■ ironSource (now part of Unity): https://www.is.com/privacy-policy/
■ Pangle: https://www.pangleglobal.com/privacy
■ Vungle (now part of Liftoff): https://liftoff.io/privacy-policy/
■ InMobi: https://www.inmobi.com/privacy-policy
■ Adjust: https://www.adjust.com/terms/privacy-policy/
■ Aarki: https://www.aarki.com/privacy
■ Bidease: https://bidease.com/privacy-policy/
■ Jampp: https://jampp.com/privacy-policy/
■ AppsFlyer: https://www.appsflyer.com/legal/privacy-policy/
Please consult the privacy policies of these partners for more information on their data practices.

• Categories of Personal Information Collected/Disclosed: In the preceding 12 months, we may have collected and disclosed for a business purpose (and potentially "sold” or “shared” for advertising purposes) the categories of personal information listed in Section 1 (Identifiers like name, email, device ID, IP address, Advertising ID; Internet or other electronic network activity information like usage data; Geolocation data; Commercial information like transaction history if applicable; Profile data like preferences).

• Categories of Personal Information Collected/Disclosed: In the preceding 12 months, we may have collected and disclosed for a business purpose (and potentially "sold” or “shared” for advertising purposes) the categories of personal information listed in Section 1 (Identifiers like name, email, device ID, IP address, Advertising ID; Internet or other electronic network activity information like usage data; Geolocation data; Commercial information like transaction history if applicable; Profile data like preferences).
